acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.token: Token enum value representing the token to be used for payment.

returns.token_: The address of the chosen token's contract.

params.creAddress: The address of the CRE contract that is allowed to call the `pay` function.
params.owner: The address of the initial owner of the contract.
params.usdc: The address of the USDC token contract.
params.usdt: The address of the USDT token contract.
params.wbtc: The address of the WBTC token contract.
params.weth: The address of the WETH token contract.

params.user: The address of the user whose payment information is being requested.

returns.userInfo_: A struct containing the user's last payment date and chosen token.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.amounts: An array of uint256 values representing the amounts to be paid to each user, in USD.
params.users: An array of addresses representing the users to be paid.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

CRE().notice: Returns the address of the CRE contract that is allowed to call the `pay` function.

USDC().notice: Returns the address of the USDC token contract.

USDT().notice: Returns the address of the USDT token contract.

WBTC().notice: Returns the address of the WBTC token contract.

WETH().notice: Returns the address of the WETH token contract.

choseToken(uint8).notice: Choses the token used for payment.

getUserInfo(address).notice: Returns the payment information for a given user.

pay(address[],uint256[]).notice: Executes payment to a list of users with corresponding amounts. Can only be called by the CRE contract.
